W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESITUTION OF PREMISES AT 5831 THORNTON ST, S.F, CA. - WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 6-30-94 - IF DEF. VACATES AS AGREED, PL. WAIVES ALL RENT & DAMAGES - IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE PL. ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT FOR $5,224 RENT & DAMAGES - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - NO FURTHER STAYS ON EVICTION - POSSESSIONS LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITLEY, MONROE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 533 THORNTON AVENUE, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-1994, LEASE FORFEITED
